present_not_claimed: hardware-level energy gain without separate counters
required_not_claimed: hardware-level energy gain without separate counters

evidence.not_published: raw local proofs, sensitive environment paths, commercial tuning and private thresholds
evidence.published: sanitized proof summaries and public documentation

interpretation.boundary: This guard audits public text and release claim boundaries; it does not validate private deployments.
interpretation.purpose: Verify that public PNVA claims stay inside the evidence boundary established by the root release seal.
interpretation.sovereignty: A strong public architecture must prove what it does not claim, not only what it claims.

recommendations: Run this guard after the root release verifier and before public posting.
Treat any unbounded high-risk claim as a publication blocker.
Keep this guard outside the root release seal because it validates post-seal public language.
